name: boardman-hamilton.com
message: [AI generated] Boardman-Hamilton Company is a full-service, independent insurance agency. Located in Philadelphia, they have been in business for over 80 years. They provide a comprehensive range of insurance services, including personal, business, health, life, and special risk insurance. They offer personalized service, focusing on understanding individual client needs, ensuring adequate coverage at cost-effective rates. They have a skilled team of insurance professionals who guide clients in making informed insurance decisions.
